title: Expert Turns Bullish on $POD Amid AI Inference Growth
summary: Crypto analyst Tom Anderson is optimistic about $POD, citing a 5x annual growth in AI inference and OpenRouter's token usage surge. He believes smaller models will capture more market share, making $POD an attractive investment.
body:
Crypto analyst Tom Anderson, known as @Proofbycontradi on X, has expressed growing bullishness on the cryptocurrency $POD. He attributes this optimism to the rapid expansion of AI inference, which is growing at a rate of 5 times per year. This growth is driven by increased usage of AI services, with platforms like ChatGPT already boasting 1 billion weekly users.

Anderson highlights OpenRouter's significant increase in token usage, going from 5 trillion to 25 trillion tokens per week year over year. He argues that as AI adoption continues to rise, value will concentrate on the cheapest tokens, with smaller models poised to take a larger share of the market. This shift could make $POD a particularly attractive investment opportunity.

For everyday investors, this news suggests that the AI and crypto sectors are becoming increasingly intertwined. As AI technologies become more prevalent, cryptocurrencies like $POD could see substantial growth, offering new avenues for investment and potential high returns. Anderson's insights indicate a strategic shift towards smaller, more efficient models, which could drive significant value in the crypto market.

Investors should watch for further developments in AI inference technologies and token usage trends. As the market evolves, keeping an eye on platforms like OpenRouter and the performance of smaller models could provide valuable insights for making informed investment decisions. Read more → https://x.com/Proofbycontradi/status/2064951836201849260
